explanation::baweja media\n\nactively hi.answer: Highest ticket I’ve personally closed is ₹1,20,000 for a 3‑month DFY performance marketing + funnel optimization engagement (Meta Ads + landing page + retargeting) during my freelancing period in 2021–2022. The prospect was spending aggressively but had inconsistent ROAS, so I walked them through a live account review—CPA/CTR trends, audience overlap, creative fatigue, and Pixel event gaps—and quantified the monthly revenue leakage to justify the fee. The main objection was “We’ve tried agencies before; results weren’t consistent.” I overcame it by presenting a clear audit-based action plan, weekly reporting cadence, and success metrics tied to CAC and lead-to-sale conversion, aligning with Baweja Media’s 25‑Point audit + close process.
explanation::baweja media\n\nactively hi.question: Highest ticket you've personally closed. Share ₹ amount, product/service, time period, and ONE objection you had to overcome. 100-150 words.

explanation::carebuddy::digital marketin.answer: You should invite me because I’ve repeatedly grown social communities at scale using data-driven content strategy—most recently driving 300k+ follower growth and increasing Instagram from 7.2k to 98k (+1261%) and LinkedIn from 250 to 1.5k (+500%) through platform-specific tactics, storytelling, and consistent community engagement. For CareBuddy’s Travel Hands, I can translate your impact (1,500+ assisted journeys and 400+ VIPs supported) into high-performing reels, carousels, blogs, and newsletters, while tracking KPIs like reach, saves, shares, and watch time to iterate fast. I’m hands-on with Canva, Clipchamp, WordPress, and social scheduling tools (Hootsuite/Buffer), and I’ve run lead-focused campaigns and managed high-visibility events—skills that align with your growth phase and partnership-driven outreach. Most importantly, I’m motivated to build an accessibility-first digital presence that grows awareness, trust, and community participation.
explanation::carebuddy::digital marketin.question: Give us one good reason why we should invite you to our team?

explanation::carebuddy::digital marketin.answer: I have 3+ years of hands-on digital marketing experience focused on social media growth, content strategy, and paid campaigns across Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube, and websites. In my most recent role, I built and executed quarterly social strategies that grew audiences by 300k+ and drove major platform growth (e.g., Instagram 7.2k to 98k; Facebook 44k to 231k; LinkedIn 250 to 1.5k) through trend-led content, community engagement, and performance tracking. I create short-form video and graphics using Canva and Clipchamp, manage scheduling and reporting via tools like Meta Business Suite, Hootsuite/Buffer, and optimize content with strong captions, hashtags, and CTAs. For CareBuddy, I can apply this experience to deliver accessibility-focused storytelling, consistent multi-platform content, and data-driven campaigns supported by SEO/blog/newsletter content and active community management.
explanation::carebuddy::digital marketin.question: What is your experience like in digital marketing?

At Adztronaut, I can apply this experience to produce engaging video edits and motion-led creatives that align with client brand objectives and campaign goals. I’m comfortable managing multiple deliverables under deadlines and iterating creatives based on performance insights to improve reach, engagement, and lead outcomes.

explanation::digital domination services.answer: I typically send 8–12 highly targeted Upwork proposals per day, prioritizing relevance and personalization to improve reply and conversion rates. I’ve worked across digital marketing and social media projects in entertainment/media, finance, e-commerce, real estate/rentals, luxury travel/caravan rentals, furniture, newsletters, pet products, and esports. This mix has strengthened my ability to qualify leads quickly, tailor proposals to client goals, and manage multiple conversations and follow-ups—aligned with the Senior Business Development Manager role at Digital Domination Services. My hands-on experience with paid campaigns, community growth, and website work also helps me position SEO, branding, and digital marketing services effectively during outreach and closing.
explanation::digital domination services.question: How many Upwork proposals do you typically send per day, and what industries have you worked with?

explanation::digital domination services.answer:
Sample 1 (SEO + Social Growth): Hi [Client Name]—I reviewed your site and noticed quick wins in on-page SEO + content distribution. I can deliver a 30-day plan covering keyword mapping, content calendar, and social amplification, plus weekly reporting on reach, engagement, and leads. I’ve grown communities rapidly (e.g., 1261% Instagram growth and 500% LinkedIn growth) and can align the same data-led approach to your goals. If you share your website + target locations, I’ll send a 1-page audit and proposal within 24 hours.

Sample 2 (Paid Ads + Lead Gen): Hi [Client Name]—your offer is strong, but the funnel needs tighter targeting and creatives to improve CPL. I’ll set up Meta campaigns with clear audience segments, A/B creatives, and a simple landing-page flow, then optimize daily based on CTR, CPL, and lead quality. I’ve run targeted Facebook/Instagram campaigns that generated 50+ leads in two weeks and can replicate this with structured follow-ups. Can you confirm your monthly budget and ideal customer profile?
